subject: disease of trees
predicate: is stated to be of two varieties
object: internal and external
verbatim_snippet: The disease of all types of trees is stated to be of two varieties: internal and external
notes: Defines tree diseases as internal and external types.

subject: internal diseases
object: vata, pitta, and kafa (humors)
verbatim_snippet: The internal ones are those which are caused by vata, pitta, and kafa (humors)
notes: Specifies causes of internal tree diseases.

subject: external diseases
object: insects, cold weather, etc.
verbatim_snippet: external ones are those which are caused by insects, cold weather, etc.
notes: Specifies causes of external tree diseases.

subject: land
object: excessive supply of dry and pungent matters
verbatim_snippet: the diseases caused by rta are due to the land that becomes arid on account of excessive supply of dry and pungent matters.
notes: Links arid land to dry and pungent inputs.

subject: trees
object: thinness, crookedness, knots, hard fruits
verbatim_snippet: These diseases are: thinness and crookedness of trunk, appearance of knots on the trunk or leaves, and the fruits being hard, with less juice and less sweetness.

subject: trees
object: paleness, dwarfing, tastelessness, premature fruits
verbatim_snippet: These diseases are taking long time to bear fruits, paleness, dwarfing of leaves, tastelessness, and prematurety of fruits.

subject: kafa-type diseases
object: winter and spring
conditions: excessive watering with sweet, oily, sour, or cold materials
verbatim_snippet: The diseases of the kafr type occur in winter and in spring if the trees are excessively watered with materials which are sweet, oily, sour, or cold.
notes: Compares disease occurrence by season and watering.

subject: pitta-type diseases
object: end of summer
conditions: clouds disappear and excessive watering with bitter, sour, salty, and strong materials
verbatim_snippet: The diseases of the pitta type occur at the end of summer if the clouds disappear and the trees are excessively watered with materials which are bitter, sour, salty, and strong.
notes: Compares pitta-type disease timing and watering.

subject: trees
object: exposure to fire or lightning, aridity of soil, absence of water
verbatim_snippet: The trees dry up due to exposure to fire or lightning, as well as due to the aridity of the soil and absence of water.

subject: broken trees
object: paste of bark of plaksha and udumbura mixed with ghee, honey, wine, and milk
conditions: broken parts tied with rope of rice stalk
verbatim_snippet: The broken trees should be smeared with the paste of the bark of plaksha and udumbura mixed with ghee, honey, wine, and milk and the broken parts should be firmly tied together with the rope of a rice stalk.

subject: trees affected by kafa disease
predicate: should have earth removed and replaced
object: fresh, dry earth
verbatim_snippet: In case of trees affected by the kafa disease, earth around the roots of the trees should be removed and fresh, dry earth should be replaced for curing them.

subject: trees suffering from pitta-type diseases
object: decoction of milk, honey, yastimadhu, and madhuka
verbatim_snippet: When watered by the decoction of milk, honey, yastimadhu, and madhuka, trees suffering from pitta type of diseases get cured.

subject: trees with worms
object: cold water for seven days
conditions: to remove insects from roots and branches
verbatim_snippet: To remove insects both from the roots and branches of the trees, wise men should water the trees with cold water for seven days.

subject: wounds caused by insects
object: milk after anointing with mixture of vidanga, sesame, cow's urine, ghee, and mustard
verbatim_snippet: A wound caused by insects heals if sprinkled with milk after being anointed with a mixture of vidanga, sesame, cow's urine, ghee, and mustard.

subject: trees scorched with fire
object: mud from lotus creeper and watered with kumapa mixture
verbatim_snippet: If the trees are scorched with fire the whole tree should be smeared with mud from the lotus creeper and then should be watered with kumapa mixture. Then its branches grow up to the sky.

subject: diseases caused by imbalance of rasta
object: flesh, marrow, and ghee; sprinkling of kusapa water
verbatim_snippet: Diseases caused by imbalance of rasta can be cured by flesh, marrow, and ghee. The sprinkling of kusapa water also removes all the disorders caused by the rasta element.

subject: diseases of kafa type
object: bitter, strong, and astringent decoctions made out of panchamula
verbatim_snippet: The diseases of the kafa type can be overcome with bitter, strong, and astringent decoctions made out of panchamula (roots of five plant species—sriphala, sarvatobhadra, patala, gamikarika, and syonaka) with fragrant water.
notes: Prescribes panchamula decoction for kafa diseases.

subject: trees affected by pitta type diseases
object: cool and sweet substances
verbatim_snippet: A wise person should treat all types of trees affected by the pitta type of diseases with cool and sweet substances.
notes: Prescribes cool and sweet substances for pitta diseases.

subject: diagnosis and treatment
object: one whose industry is guided by superior intelligence
verbatim_snippet: various diseases of trees should be diagnosed by the above-stated respective indications and treatment should be given by one whose industry is guided by superior intelligence.

subject: non-productive trees
object: when fed with milk and knapwa water
verbatim_snippet: Non-productive trees bear fruits and flowers to one's complete satisfaction when they are fed with milk and knapwa water.
